name: Aunt Jean's Almond Bread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jean Aniolowski Preparation Time: 1:10
This is a heavy dough! Cream sugar, oil, eggs, and vanilla. Sift and add flour, baking powder. Stir in nuts.
Place on a baking sheet in strips about 4 to 5 inches wide, the length of the baking sheet, and about 3/4 inch thick. Leave space between strips. Bake at 350 degrees for about 20 minutes until firm, but not brown.
Carefully transfer to a cutting board, and cut into 1-inch slices. Lay the slices on their sides on a cookie sheet.
Toast slices in the oven, turning if necessary until brown (about 30 to 35 minutes). Watch carefully.
